_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - Pterodactyl® https://pterodactyl.io
name: TaystJK
author: admin@example.com
description: Runs the TaystJK modern64 dedicated server on Pterodactyl from an image-managed source build. The egg is intentionally minimal: only four panel variables are exposed and all runtime behavior (server, supervisor, addons, anti-VPN, RCON guard, event bus) is configured manually through /home/container/config/jka-runtime.json and through the operator's own server.cfg. The runtime never ships Jedi Academy base assets.

installation.script:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

cd /mnt/server

: "${COPYRIGHT_ACKNOWLEDGED:=false}"
[[ "${COPYRIGHT_ACKNOWLEDGED}" == "true" ]] || {
  printf '[ERROR] COPYRIGHT_ACKNOWLEDGED must be true. This egg does not distribute Jedi Academy assets.\n' >&2
  exit 1
}

mkdir -p \
  /mnt/server/base \
  /mnt/server/logs \
  /mnt/server/addons \
  /mnt/server/config

# Materialise the runtime config files only when missing so operator
# edits survive reinstalls. No example file is written next to them:
# the canonical schema/defaults are documented in
# /home/container/addons/docs/ADDON_README.md.
RUNTIME_PATH=/mnt/server/config/jka-runtime.json
ADDONS_PATH=/mnt/server/config/jka-addons.json

if [[ ! -f "${RUNTIME_PATH}" ]]; then
  cat > "${RUNTIME_PATH}" <<'JSON'
{
  "server": {
    "fs_game": "taystjk",
    "config": "server.cfg",
    "log_filename": "server.log",
    "port_fallback": 29070,
    "sync_managed_taystjk_payload": true
  },
  "supervisor": {
    "enabled": true,
    "debug_startup": false,
    "live_output_mirror_enabled": false
  },
  "anti_vpn": {
    "enabled": false,
    "mode": "block",
    "score_threshold": 90,
    "allowlist": [],
    "timeout_ms": 1500,
    "cache_ttl": "6h",
    "cache_flush_interval": "2s",
    "audit_log_path": "/home/container/logs/anti-vpn-audit.log",
    "audit_allow": true,
    "log_decisions": false,
    "providers": {
      "proxycheck_api_key": "",
      "ipapiis_api_key": "",
      "iphub_api_key": "",
      "vpnapi_io_api_key": "",
      "ipqualityscore_api_key": "",
      "iplocate_api_key": ""
    },
    "broadcast": {
      "mode": "pass-and-block",
      "cooldown": "90s",
      "pass_template": "say [Anti-VPN] VPN PASS: %PLAYER% cleared checks (%SCORE%/%THRESHOLD%). %SUMMARY%",
      "block_template": "say [Anti-VPN] VPN BLOCKED: %PLAYER% triggered anti-VPN (%SCORE%/%THRESHOLD%). %SUMMARY%"
    },
    "enforcement": {
      "mode": "kick-only",
      "kick_command": "clientkick %SLOT%",
      "ban_command": ""
    }
  },
  "rcon_guard": {
    "enabled": true,
    "action": "kick",
    "broadcast": true,
    "ignore_hosts": ["127.0.0.1", "::1", "localhost"]
  },
  "addons": {
    "enabled": true,
    "directory": "/home/container/addons",
    "strict": false,
    "timeout_seconds": 30,
    "log_output": true,
    "event_bus": {
      "enabled": true,
      "buffer_size": 1000,
      "drop_policy": "drop-oldest"
    }
  }
}
JSON
  printf '[INFO] Created default runtime config at %s\n' "${RUNTIME_PATH}"
else
  printf '[INFO] Existing runtime config preserved at %s\n' "${RUNTIME_PATH}"
fi

if [[ ! -f "${ADDONS_PATH}" ]]; then
  cat > "${ADDONS_PATH}" <<'JSON'
{
  "addons": {
    "announcer": {
      "enabled": false,
      "order": 20,
      "type": "scheduled",
      "script": "announcer.py",
      "announce_command": "svsay",
      "interval_seconds": 300,
      "messages_file": "announcer.messages.txt"
    },
    "live_team_announcer": {
      "enabled": false,
      "order": 30,
      "type": "event",
      "script": "live-team-announcer.py",
      "announce_command": "svsay",
      "min_seconds_between_announcements": 3
    },
    "chatlogger": {
      "enabled": false,
      "order": 40,
      "type": "event",
      "script": "chatlogger.py"
    }
  }
}
JSON
  printf '[INFO] Created default addons config at %s\n' "${ADDONS_PATH}"
else
  printf '[INFO] Existing addons config preserved at %s\n' "${ADDONS_PATH}"
fi

printf '[INFO] Game assets are manual-only. Upload your legally owned base assets to /mnt/server/base before starting the server.\n'
printf '[INFO] Edit %s to change runtime behavior; only COPYRIGHT_ACKNOWLEDGED, EXTRA_STARTUP_ARGS, SERVER_BINARY and TAYSTJK_AUTO_UPDATE_BINARY remain as panel variables.\n' "${RUNTIME_PATH}"

variables.name: Copyright Acknowledged
variables.description: Required acknowledgment that you legally own the Jedi Academy base assets you upload into /home/container/base. The runtime refuses to start unless this is true. The image never distributes copyrighted assets.

variables.name: Extra Startup Args
variables.description: Optional additional arguments appended verbatim to the dedicated server command line after +exec server.cfg. Quotes may be used for grouping; shell metacharacters are rejected.

variables.name: Server Binary
variables.description: Path of the dedicated server executable under /home/container to launch. Treated as a manual user-owned binary unless TAYSTJK_AUTO_UPDATE_BINARY is true, in which case the value is ignored and the image-managed taystjkded.x86_64 is used.

variables.name: Auto-Update TaystJK Binary
variables.description: When true, the runtime syncs the image-managed TaystJK modern64 binary from /opt/jka/engine/taystjkded.x86_64 into /home/container/taystjkded.x86_64 on every start, ignoring SERVER_BINARY. When false (the default), no engine binary is overwritten and SERVER_BINARY is treated as a manual user-owned path under /home/container.
